title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, describes a shift in software engineering from manual coding to management of autonomous agents. He cites data showing agent requests exploding in 2025, with 30% of Cursor PRs now fully agent-developed and enterprise AI-generated code rising from 15% to 75% in a year, positioning engineers as agent managers.
